testcase.name: test_complete_with_writing_answers

failure.message:
AssertionError: complete: 502 The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_handoff_iter75.py:244: in test_complete_with_writing_answers assert c.status_code == 200, f"complete: {c.status_code} {c.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: complete: 502 The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
